title: Crispy Sweet Adventurous Egg Plant Stir-fry
description: A savory and crispy Vietnamese dish featuring egg plants, prepared with high-protein ingredients for a delightful meal.
instructions: Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add the vegetable oil and swirl to coat.
Add the eggplant slices and sauté for about 5 minutes until they start to brown slightly. Remove from pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add more oil if needed. Add minced garlic and red bell pepper strips. Sauté for another minute or so until softened.
Add chopped chicken pieces into the pan. Cook for about 3-4 minutes until fully cooked through, stirring occasionally.
Return the eggplant slices to the pan along with chopped yellow onion. Mix all ingredients together well.
Season with soy sauce and black pepper to taste. Stir-fry everything together for another minute or two to meld the flavors.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course with steamed rice.
